courses.title: Coach courses
courses.subtitle: Create Telegram storefront courses and link existing Telegram groups.
courses.formDescription: Manage price, access duration, and publish state here.
courses.drawerDescription: Create the course step by step: details, cover image, and pricing settings.
courses.validation: Title, price, and access duration are required.
courses.groupChatIdPrompt: Enter Telegram chat ID or public username
courses.groupMissing: Create the Telegram group first, add the bot as an admin, then link it with the chat ID.
courses.publishHint: Only published courses are visible in the bot.

placeholders.title: Example: 30-day transformation
placeholders.description: What the course includes, who it is for, and expected results

coverUpload.title: Upload a cover image
coverUpload.description: Choose an image or drop it here.
coverUpload.hint: PNG, JPG, or WEBP. Maximum size 8 MB.
coverUpload.imageOnly: Only image files can be uploaded.
coverUpload.maxSize: Image size must be smaller than {{size}}.

queue.title: Purchase queue
queue.subtitle: Review receipts, approve users, and manage active access.
queue.empty: No course purchases waiting for review.
queue.extendValidation: Enter the number of days to extend
queue.noReceipt: No receipt has been attached yet.

telegram.title: Telegram access
telegram.subtitle: Manage the coach bot, welcome flow, and course group flow here.
telegram.error: Failed to save Telegram access settings
telegram.paymentDescription: Payment instructions shown to users during bot checkout.
telegram.securityHint: Full card numbers are not stored. Use a Payme/Click link, bank instruction, or masked card display.
telegram.drawerDescription: Enter the card and payment instructions shown during checkout from here.
telegram.botDescription: Bot token, welcome message, and menu setup remain on the existing bot page.
telegram.botCopy: Users browse and buy courses in Telegram. This page handles bot setup, welcome flow, and Telegram group access settings.
telegram.groupSetupDescription: The bot does not create private groups on its own. The coach creates the group, makes the bot an admin, and then links it to the course.
telegram.groupSetupHint: The "Link group" action on each course asks for the chat ID and title. Invite-link creation and member removal only work if the bot is an admin in that group.
telegram.cardsListDescription: Store multiple cards and choose which one is active during checkout.
telegram.cardsEmpty: No cards added yet. Add the first card below.

cardEditor.description: Save the card once, then choose it as the active checkout card.

validation.cardRequired: Enter at least the first and last 4 digits of the card.

placeholders.paymentInstructions: Example: Payme/Click link or short bank-transfer instructions

steps.connectBot: Connect the coach bot first or verify that it is active.
steps.createGroup: Create a Telegram group for the course.
steps.addBotAsAdmin: Add the bot as an admin with invite-link and ban-member permissions.
steps.linkCourseGroup: Open the course page and link the group using its chat ID.

aiSummary.title: AI Summary
aiSummary.description: Analysis of client's recent activity and nutrition

mocks.overview: {{name}} strictly followed the set calorie limit last week and is fulfilling the water norm by 90%. Macronutrient balance is good, especially protein intake is according to plan.
mocks.pos1: Sugar intake has decreased significantly in the last 3 days.
mocks.pos2: Exercise duration increased by 15% compared to last week.
mocks.con1: Daily step count is still below target 10,000 (average 7,200).
mocks.con2: Carbohydrate intake slightly exceeds the plan on weekends.
mocks.rec1: I recommend increasing cardio exercises by 20 minutes for the new week.
mocks.rec2: Increasing the proportion of vegetables in dinner will be beneficial.
